ticker_items: Iran war enters 12th day with mounting civilian casualties
140 US service members wounded in initial Iran strikes
Strait of Hormuz blocked disrupting global oil supplies
Girls school bombing in Iran kills over 170
Hezbollah launches 100+ rockets at Israeli targets

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian air strike hits Russian military electronics plant with seven killed.
Russia targets Ukraine's railways with drone attacks to disrupt economy and supply lines.

middle_east.description: Attack on Iranian girls' school kills more than 170 people.
Hezbollah launches over 100 rockets, drones, and missiles at 50+ Israeli targets in joint IRGC operation.
Israeli tank fire kills Catholic priest in civilian dwelling in Lebanon.
Three commercial ships damaged in Persian Gulf maritime attacks.

middle_east.text: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has urged international bodies to denounce the US-Israeli aggression against Iran's civilian infrastructure and ordinary people
middle_east.speaker: Masoud Pezeshkian
middle_east.title: President of Iran

observers.description: Foreign Minister Wadephul visits Cyprus, Israel and Saudi Arabia focusing on Middle East escalation. Germany remains committed to peace and security in the region while maintaining close contact with allies and partners.
China steps up shuttle diplomacy amid Strait of Hormuz tensions. Beijing is rebuilding its grip on North Korea with new infrastructure projects and increased investment along their shared border.
US transfers THAAD missile system components from South Korea to Middle East amid Iran conflict. South Korea pays the price as US burns anti-missile munitions at furious rate.
Prime Minister Albanese criticized for sending Australian troops to Middle East. Senator warns Australia is helping US 'rain down horror' on Iran by hitching to the conflict.
Pretoria navigates awkward diplomatic dance between Washington and Tehran during Iran war. South Africa maintains complex balancing act between competing global powers.

financial.notes: Global oil prices linger at high levels due to Strait of Hormuz blockade disrupting world energy supplies.

update_log.text: Iran war enters 12th day with mounting civilian casualties and deepening regional conflict risks
UN Security Council adopts Resolution 2817 condemning Iran's attacks against neighbors
Strait of Hormuz blocked by Iran disrupting global oil and gas shipments
Hezbollah declares military campaign against Israel in joint IRGC operation
Iranian girls' school bombing becomes focal point of civilian casualty concerns
